description_long: This object consists of four adult human figures standing side by side, each with distinct clothing styles and postures. The first figure wears a dark, fitted outfit with a high collar and boots, exuding a modern, tactical look. The second figure is shirtless, displaying a muscular build, and wears pants and boots, with a headband or tied hair. The third figure is dressed in a full-body, light-colored tracksuit with a hood, giving a casual, athletic appearance. The fourth figure wears a knee-length coat or tunic with a belt and boots, suggesting a more formal or uniformed style. All figures have their arms slightly outstretched and stand upright, facing forward. The group displays a range of urban pedestrian attire, suitable for various city environments.
description: A group of four adult pedestrians, each with distinct urban clothing styles and upright postures, standing side by side with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four figures' faces, clothing details, and arm positions.
description_view_1: Side view showing the profiles of the figures, highlighting the depth and silhouette of their outfits.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the figures, including hoods, hair, and coat details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profiles and the layering of the group.
attribute_clothing_type: urban casual and semi-formal outfits including a fitted tactical suit, pants with bare torso, hooded tracksuit, and knee-length coat or tunic
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: short hair, tied hair, hooded, and short styled hair
